name: Pizzalinni Greek Salad Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small but deep bowl, mix the mustard and salt with the egg.
2. Gradually add the vinegar, incorporating one drop of oil at a time while beating constantly until about one-third of the oil has been added.
3. Once the mixture begins to thicken, continue adding the remaining oil several drops at a time.
4. Beat in the lemon juice slowly.
5. Stir in the minced garlic, dried oregano, and Worcestershire sauce.
6. Add pepper.
7. Refrigerate the dressing. Makes about 1 1/4 cups.
